div.h1: Pointer-Based BST: Memory Locality & Cache Miss Analysis

p.strong: Architecture Specification: Standard Heap-Allocated Node (O(h) Cache Misses)
p.em: Note: Each level transition triggers a random memory access, bypassing spatial locality.

div.p: Root Cause: The CPU hardware prefetcher is unable to anticipate the next pointer-chase address because nodes are allocated non-contiguously in the heap.
